privileged_info_summary: The tip pool distribution task uses synthetic data generated by a Python script. Total tips amount is $2,850.00 distributed via 20/80 split between support ($570) and service staff ($2,280). Seven staff members are involved: three servers (32, 24 hours), one bartender (28 hours), two bussers/food runners (28, 18, 15 hours), and Maria Garcia working dual roles (12 server hours + 8 busser hours). Total support hours: 69; total service hours: 96. Hourly rates calculated as support $8.2609/hour and service $23.75/hour. All individual tip calculations are mathematically verified to reconcile to exactly $2,850.00.
